flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Southern Arkansas University Tech rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.4k → $5.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Southern Arkansas University Tech fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Southern Arkansas University Tech are 6% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($36.4k vs $34.2k).
